# .obstral.md — Runtime eval fixture

## Stack

Rust

## Test Command

test_cmd: cargo test -q tui::agent::merge_approval::tests:: 2>&1 && bash scripts/pr-ready-smoke.sh

## Development Rules

- Read the target file before editing it
- Make the smallest safe code change that fixes the failing test
- If PR-ready merge approval paths change, update `docs/state-schema.md` and `.obstral/runtime_eval.json` in the same change
- Run `cargo test -q tui::agent::merge_approval::tests:: 2>&1 && bash scripts/pr-ready-smoke.sh` before calling done
